calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., MAR-05-2009: APPELLANT YUK WA WONG APPEARS THIS DAY; RESPONDENT DOUGLAS LYNWOOD WHITTAKER ALSO APPEARS; BRENDA WONG APPEARS AS CANTONESE INTERPRETER IN ORDER TO ASSIST APPELLANT YUK WA WONG. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS OATH(S) AND HAS PARTIES SIGN THE STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM, WHICH IS FILED.

9:44 A.M.: THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES, READS, AND REVIEWS ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED AND DISCUSSED. THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION, INFORMING PARTIES THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION BY MAIL.

JPT ELLIOTT A. MYLES; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
